name: Sumireko Usami: A nice day in the 'Ruins'
description:
Don't Mind me. just putting up this sign;

🪧All Characters are 18+ in this.

Behold! A Poorly made title! And surprisingly enough, something normal for once. I know, surprising.

Might try more of this type of stuff from time to time... maybe. Anyways, hope you enjoy.

Characters Involve:

👧🏻🤳🏻👓: Sumireko Usami

🤖🌌: Amane Shin

🤖🌱🚀:Tenxka Shin

[Link to OG Artist: https://www.deviantart.com/intruder251/art/Sumireko-Usami-Touhou-772061076]

Note; Man, today's been a complete bummer. Having to start the day with a headache, and my room deciding to be a complete mess, too. And I don't even have time to fix it, cause I had to rush over for Exams today. And then it just decides to rain too on top of it all! You'd really think I got on someone's pet peeve with all my luck today...

I am a bit worried about everyone else though. I don't know why, but I just can't get myself to dream back into Gensokyo. But the weirdest thing is, it feels like I'm already dreaming of that at the same time. Like, it feels like I am there... and like I'm not at the same time.

Well, its not like I got nothing left to do today, at least. With how much rain there was today, I'm sure that strange mud should be pretty easy to find! It'd be fun getting to see what's causing people to get knocked out just by touching it. Maybe it'll be a new type of Youkai I haven't seen at that! So let's get going! Don't wanna miss out on my chance, after all.

-Sumireko's Digital Diary, July 28
creator: Bollin
